name: ponytail-debt
tagline: Greps the repo for `ponytail:` shortcut-comment markers and compiles them into a ranked debt ledger with ceiling/upgrade-path per entry.
verdict: Simple, mostly read-only ledger-builder with a clear scan step and a concrete output template. Two real defects: the stated directory exclusions (node_modules, .git, build output) aren't reflected in the actual grep command shown, and the output row format has no worked example. No version/changelog either.

highlights.summary: Prose on line 14 claims the scan skips node_modules/.git/build output, but the given grep command has no --exclude-dir and doesn't skip them.
Bespoke ledger row format given only as a placeholder template, no filled worked example.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
